title: pulegium daghestanicum
intro: Pulegium daghestanicum, also known as Dagestan pennyroyal, is a plant species of the mint family native to the Caucasus region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its essential oils that have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Pulegium daghestanicum include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Pulegium daghestanicum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
